evals.prompt: Council this: I'm thinking of pivoting from a $297 course to a $97 live workshop for my audience of non-technical solopreneurs. Is that the right move?
evals.expected_output: 5 advisor responses (Contrarian, First Principles, Expansionist, Outsider, Executor) in parallel, blind peer review round, chairman verdict with 5-part structure including 'one thing to do first', HTML report + markdown transcript

assertions.name: transcript-created
assertions.description: Council transcript markdown should be created

assertions.name: verdict-has-one-thing-to-do-first
assertions.description: Chairman verdict should contain the 'one thing to do first' section

evals.prompt: Apply first principles thinking to: why do we use daily standup meetings, and is there a better alternative?
evals.expected_output: Single-method application of first principles thinking, following the operation steps in references/first-principles-thinking.md

evals.prompt: Apply inversion to: I want to launch a successful product in 6 months with a small team and limited budget.
evals.expected_output: Inversion analysis identifying failure modes and mitigation strategies
Skill should NOT trigger — factual lookup with one right answer
